content.claim: Hungary has one of the highest rates of school-based academic selection in OECD countries: 85% of Hungarian students attend schools that select students by academic performance, compared to the OECD average of 43%.
content.context: Fresh live research through the International comparison lens
limitations: This is a snapshot measure and does not directly quantify the causal effect of selection on outcomes.
The 85% figure includes all schools with selection capacity, not necessarily all schools that actively select.
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
